title: CSS 2026: container queries retired our utility class
meta_description: Cut CSS bundle 86% with container queries and @layer — main-thread time fell 67%, merge conflicts dropped 80%. Real numbers from a Vietnamese fintech app handling 2.3 million users.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams still ship 100 KB of CSS because they’re stuck with legacy breakpoints.

In 2026 you can use container queries, @layer, and nesting to cut that in half.

https://kubaik.github.io/css-2026-container-queries-retired-our-utility-class

#Innovation #Performance #Docker #Containers

Done this differently? Tell me what worked.
